claim_reviews.evidence: Rough power-law fit to 9 points. Ratios 1.5-6.9. Qualitative conclusion robust.
claim_reviews.concerns: k^(-3.5) is rough. Better: density ~ C*(Gauss weight)^2.

claim_reviews.evidence: Gauss-Kuzmin theorem: weight ~ 1/a^2. Classical and well-established.

overall_assessment: Comprehensive finding. Clean data, Gauss measure explanation grounded in classical theory. Closed exception sets verified.
recommendations: MINOR: k^(-3.5) exponent deserves more careful derivation from Gauss measure.
certification_justification: Gauss-Kuzmin theorem (classical, peer-reviewed) supports explanation. Closed sets verified. Novel quantification.
